choices.label: Coordinated multi-layer envelope-remodeling program (comprehensive 5-layer atlas, each layer at its actual evidence level)
Sphingolipid substitution + Lpt repurposing + species specificity (highest-novelty single mechanism; extends Uchendu 2026 / Zik 2022)
Fur-regulon dissection + honest recalibration (most defensible; Path A enriched, Path B not; dual-release switch collapses to one arm)

prompt_to_user: throughline_candidates.md written, 3 candidates (tier: STRONG, recommended mode: paper). Review candidates and pick one, then invoke beril-paper-writer continue.
